latin.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Murus latericius antiquissimus notus ad ~7500 a.C.n. in Hiericho pertinet!
latin.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Turris Inclinata Pisana inclinationem 3,97° habet propter fundamenta tenuia!
latin.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon marmore, calce, et fibulis ferreis usus est!
latin.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal perfecte symmetricum est secundum axem centralem.
latin.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Pons Çanakkale anni 1915 per 2.023 metra extenditur!
latin.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Iglu formis tholi utuntur ad iacturam caloris minuendam!
latin.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) forma plani Y-formata utitur!
latin.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Pyramis Magna 2,3 miliones cuborum lapideorum continet!
latin.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Architecti lucem, ventilationem, integritatem, et pulchritudinem librant!
latin.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Utere omnibus 12 generibus formarum in una structura
latin.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Utere omnibus 6 materiis in una structura
latin.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studium Architecturae. Compendia claviaturae: P Pone, E Dele, A Pinge, R Verte.
latin.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Insere codicem communicandi ad consilium importandum
latin.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Tensio effectiva humilis. Structura condiciones extremas tolerat.
latin.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Intra marginem consilii. Onera normalia superat.
latin.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Limini defectionis appropinquans. Marginalis sub pressura.
latin.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Hypothesis: Quando rigiditas structuram oneratam servat?
latin.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Explica quomodo gravitas, rigiditas, et massa inter se agant ad stabilitatem determinandam.

haitian_creole.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Pi ansyen mi brik yo konnen an soti nan ~7500 anvan epòk nou an nan Jeriko!
haitian_creole.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Gwo Kay Panche Pize a gen yon enklinezon 3,97° akòz fondasyon ki pa fon!
haitian_creole.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Pateyon an te sèvi ak mab, wòch kalkè, ak kranpon fè!
haitian_creole.the_colosseum_has_80_arched_entrances: Kolize a gen 80 antre an ak!
haitian_creole.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal la pafètman simetrik sou aks santral li.
haitian_creole.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ lajè, 3+ wotè, pa gen eleman k ap flote
haitian_creole.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Iglou yo sèvi ak fòm dòm pou minimize pèt chalè!
haitian_creole.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) sèvi ak yon plan an fòm Y!
haitian_creole.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Gwo Piramid la genyen 2,3 milyon blòk wòch!
haitian_creole.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Achitèk yo balanse limyè, vantilasyon, entegrite, ak estetik!
haitian_creole.have_100_blocks_in_one_build: Genyen 100+ blòk nan yon sèl konstriksyon
haitian_creole.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Sèvi ak tout 12 kalite fòm nan yon konstriksyon
haitian_creole.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Sèvi ak tout 6 materyo nan yon konstriksyon
haitian_creole.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Estidyo Achitekti. Rakoursi klavye: P Mete, E Efase, A Pentire, R Vire.
haitian_creole.apply_gravity_drop_floating_blocks: Aplike gravite (lage blòk k ap flote yo)
haitian_creole.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Kole yon kòd pataj pou enpòte yon konsepsyon
haitian_creole.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Estrès efektif ba. Estrikti a tolere kondisyon ekstrèm.
haitian_creole.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Nan maj konsepsyon yo. Li siviv chaj nòmal.
haitian_creole.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Apwoche sèy echèk la. Majinal anba estrès.
haitian_creole.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Ipotèz: Kilè rijidite sove yon estrikti ki gen twòp chaj?
haitian_creole.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Eksplike kijan gravite, rijidite, ak mas entèraji pou detèmine estabilite.
